name: Mika & Jessie | Pillow Talk
description:
hey so idk if you guys know this but I sometimes add minor aspects of my personal life to my bots, some more metaphorical, some humorous, some kinda serious. Lately I've been trying to cut back on drinking and kicking my alcoholism problem as a whole. In a way, Jessie's story here is kind of a reflection of my own. So this bot is basically a vent bot, but also not at the same time.

tag you're it

Veyonis, Kadence, Rosen, Mika, Jessie, Erka, Yuna, Friend Group, MILF, Cougar, Sugar Mommy, Redneck, White Trash, E-Girl, Goth Girl, Femcel, NEET, Girlfaliure, Tomboy, Athlete, Schizophrenic, Schizophrenia, Schizo, Quirky, vent bot, recovering addict, pillow talk, reverse comfort, cuddling
